title: GlobalMarketplace – Auction | Geyser Support
description: Cross-server Auction House for Paper with anti-dupe, Vault economy, and Discord support.
body:
##  GlobalMarketplace (Auction House & Marketplace)

GlobalMarketplace is a **modern Auction House & Marketplace plugin built exclusively for Paper and its forks**. Designed with **performance, security, and scalability** in mind, it allows your players to trade across servers safely and efficiently. With support for **fixed-price listings, timed auctions, and direct player-to-player sales**, it’s more than just an auction plugin—it’s a **complete global economy system** for your network.

![marketplace photo](https://lvyksexuedcmbwmjrsik.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/photosforcurseforge/market.png)

---

##  New in v1.0.3 – **Geyser Support!**

Bedrock players can now enjoy a **fully optimized UI experience** when using GlobalMarketplace through [Geyser](https://geysermc.org/).
Instead of forcing Java-style menus, the plugin automatically detects Bedrock users and presents **clean, mobile-friendly UIs** designed for touch controls—making cross-platform trading seamless.

![Geyser Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/417140ce27a222346685dc0eaf3de77c7c7f7a9e.png)

---

###  Features

* **Multi-Server Support** – Sync listings and prevent conflicts using Redis.
* **Anti-Dupe Protections** – Safe claim & payout system to stop duplication exploits.
* **Vault Economy Integration** – Compatible with any Vault-based economy plugin.
* **Customizable GUI** – Pagination, sounds, and themes for a seamless experience.
* **Discord Webhooks** – Announce listings, bids, and sales directly in your Discord.
* **Flexible Storage** – Flat-file or MySQL/MariaDB with HikariCP pooling.

![search](https://lvyksexuedcmbwmjrsik.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/photosforcurseforge/search.png)

---

###  Commands

`/gmarket` – Open the marketplace GUI
`/gmarkethelp` – Help menu
`/gmarket sell <price>` – Create a listing
`/gmarket auction <startPrice> <minutes>` – Start an auction
`/gmarket bid <listingUuid> <amount>` – Place a bid
`/gmarket claim [n]` – Claim deliveries
`/gmarket payout [amount|all]` – Withdraw proceeds
`/gmarket cancel <listingUuid>` – Cancel own listing
`/gmarket admin remove|reload|rollback` – Admin tools

![webhook](https://lvyksexuedcmbwmjrsik.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/photosforcurseforge/webhook.png)

---

###  Permissions

* `globalmarketplace.use` – Use commands & menus (default: true)
* `globalmarketplace.cancel` – Cancel own listings (default: true)
* `globalmarketplace.admin.remove` – Remove listings *(op)*
* `globalmarketplace.admin.reload` – Reload config *(op)*
* `globalmarketplace.admin.rollback` – Rollback sales *(op)*

---

###  Support & Community

Need help, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? Join the community here:
👉 **[GlobalMarketplace Discord](https://discord.gg/QM5beZpkYT)**

---

 GlobalMarketplace is not just another Auction House—it’s a **future-proof, Paper-optimized, cross-server economy solution**.
Now with **Geyser-powered Bedrock support**, your entire community can trade together, no matter what platform they’re on.
